message.content:
I need you to process the remaining redux ducks files from the to-delete.md file. The file lists unused code that needs to be fixed by prefixing unused parameter names in type definitions with `_`. 

Read each of these files and make the necessary edits:
1. src/redux/ducks/cardTracking.ts - Line 40: `TimelineType`, Line 78: `data`
2. src/redux/ducks/cashback.ts - Line 33: `data`, Line 45: `Transactions`
3. src/redux/ducks/contents.ts - Lines 6,14-17, Line 51: `data`
4. src/redux/ducks/createPassword.ts - Lines 5-8, 11: `data`, 57: `data`, 61: `callback`
5. src/redux/ducks/credencial.ts - Lines 5-8, 62: `lastFourNumbers`, 63: `credencial`
6. src/redux/ducks/customers/cards.ts - Lines 5-8, 11: `data`, 82: `callback`, 83: `data`
7. src/redux/ducks/customers/products.ts - Lines 5-8, 12-19, 23, 26: `data`, 179-180: parameters
8. src/redux/ducks/dacc/automaticDebt.ts - Line 57: `data`
9. src/redux/ducks/dacc/paymentChange.ts - Lines 45: `payload`, 46: `callback`
10. src/redux/ducks/downloadInvoice.ts - Lines 5-8, 17: `data`, 75-78: parameters
11. src/redux/ducks/duplicateCard.ts - Lines 5-8, 74,83-84: `data` parameters
12. src/redux/ducks/example.ts - Lines 73-74: `data` parameters
13. src/redux/ducks/exemptionEligibility.ts - Line 26: `response`
14. src/redux/ducks/forgotPassword.ts - Line 39: `State` type
15. src/redux/ducks/getMarketplace.ts - Lines 21-23, 86, 88: types/parameters
16. src/redux/ducks/homeInvoices.ts - Lines 16-19, 99: `data`
17. src/redux/ducks/invoice.ts - Lines 7-12, 129-135: parameters
18. src/redux/ducks/invoices.ts - Lines 17-20, 103: `data`
19. src/redux/ducks/invoices/barcode.ts - Lines 5-8, 11: `data`, 79-80,83: parameters
20. src/redux/ducks/invoicesList.ts - Lines 5-12, 166-168: parameters
21. src/redux/ducks/liveness.ts - Lines 6-10, 21: `data`, 84: parameters
22. src/redux/ducks/password.ts - Lines 5-8, 11: `data`, 60-61: parameters
23. src/redux/ducks/recentActivities.ts - Line 97: `data`
24. src/redux/ducks/refuel.ts - Line 227: `state`
25. src/redux/ducks/rescue.ts - Lines 5-8, 70-76,83-84: parameters
26. src/redux/ducks/searchCep.ts - Lines 5-9, 12: `data`, 124-129,167: parameters
27. src/redux/ducks/simulation.ts - Lines 5-8, 11: `data`, 99-100: parameters
28. src/redux/ducks/unlockCard.ts - Lines 5-8, 11: `data`, 57,60: parameters
29. src/redux/ducks/updateLimit.ts - Lines 5-8, 11,18,70-71: parameters
30. src/redux/ducks/updatePersonalPassword.ts - Line 67: `Creators`
31. src/redux/ducks/validateCardPassword.ts - Lines 5-8, 21,83-87,94: parameters
32. src/redux/ducks/virtualCard.ts - Lines 4,10-15, 61,111-112,114,117-118: parameters
33. src/redux/ducks/withdraw.ts - Lines 5-8, 18,37,77-83: parameters

Focus on:
1. Prefixing unused parameter names in type/interface definitions with `_`
2. Removing unused type aliases that are defined but never used
3. Do NOT remove enum values as they are part of the type system

Please read each file and make the necessary edits.
